title: Inside ServiceTitan: The Operating System For Trades Automating Contractor Workflows
description:
Business Synopsis & Direction ServiceTitan is the core software platform for the trades, providing business management tools for residential and commercial contractors.
The company generates revenue through core software subscriptions and usage fees, which are largely driven by fintech payments and partner integrations.
Customers adopt the platform to grow revenue and profit margins, scaling from small shops to private-equity-backed enterprise consolidators.
Leadership's primary focus is evolvin

title: ServiceTitan Tech Radar: Deploying agentic AI to automate workflows and drive contractor profitability
description:
ServiceTitan's single biggest technology story is its aggressive pivot to an "Agentic Operating System" that uses AI to automate contractor workflows for massive cost optimization and revenue growth.
Executives confirmed the rollout of the "Max" program, which leverages the Atlas AI to orchestrate end-to-end automation from ad spend to dispatch, with CEO Ara Mahdessian noting it helped one customer improve EBITDA margins from 18% to 30%.
Additionally, the company is deploying AI Virtual Agents t

title: ServiceTitan, Inc. Announced Q4 2026 Earnings on March 12, 2026, Reporting "Q4 total revenue of $254 million grew 21% year-over-year."
description:
ServiceTitan, Inc. reported its fourth quarter fiscal year 2026 results.
For the full fiscal year 2026, management stated, "we delivered $961 million in total revenue, growing 24% year-over-year". For the quarter, the company stated, "Q4 total revenue of $254 million grew 21% year-over-year". Subscription revenue for the fourth quarter was $192 million.
The company reported, "Q4 operating income of $27.1 million resulted in operating margin of 10.7%". Furthermore, "Q4 free cash flow was $35 mill

title: From Garage Startup to Industry Giant: The ServiceTitan Story with Ara Mahdessian!
show: Build It To Sell It: Home Service Secrets with Lance Bachmann
description:
In this episode of Build it to Sell it: Home Service Secrets with Lance Bachmann, Lance sits down with Ara Mahdessian, Co-Founder and CEO of ServiceTitan, to discuss the technology that helped modernize the trades.

Ara shares the story of growing up in a contractor family, watching the challenges his parents faced running their business, and how that experience ultimately led to the creation of ServiceTitan.

title: Fix Your P&L or Fail: Surgical Finances for Home Services with Norris Ayvazian from Service Crucible
description:
Trades coaching myths exposed: Learn why cookie-cutter playbooks don’t work and how to fix your P&L, operations, and buy-in issues for real growth. 

🚀 Contractors will walk away knowing exactly what to prioritize to scale from $1M to $10M and beyond. 

In this episode, Bill Brown sits down with Norris Ayvazian, founder of Service Crucible, to unpack: 
• Why most financials are set up incorrectly and how to fix your chart of accounts 📊

title: The Growth-Ready Contractor’s Playbook: HR, Payroll, and Performance That Scale
description: Contractors know the pain of a chaotic back office. Between recruiting, onboarding, payroll, and compliance, it’s easy for things to spiral into a full-blown admin dumpster fire. In this episode, Miter CEO and Co-founder Connor Watumull shares how to put out those flames forever. Hear how Miter’s integration with ServiceTitan helps contractors modernize their operations, reduce manual tasks, and build stronger, more loyal teams. Connor explains why onboarding is the most important loyalty test,

title: #215 Why You’re Not Getting Promoted.... and How to Fix It
show: Owned and Operated - A Plumbing, Electrical, and HVAC Business Growth Podcast
description:
In this episode of Owned and Operated, we’re exploring how to grow your career inside a home service company. From internal promotions to mindset shifts, John and Brandon Niro break down what it really takes to move up and lead.
Brandon shares how 30–40% of the Wilson team has been promoted from within—and what separates those who grow fast from those who stall. They dig into Wilson’s 52-week Emerging Leaders program, the role of emotional intelligence and financial literacy, and how team member

title: Marketing, Sales, Capacity Planning, and Scaling Home Services with Ismael Valdez
description: Tommy Mello hosts a Super Bowl day episode of The Home Service Expert with Ismael Valdez, founder of VE and NextGen (Anaheim), discussing how to scale home service businesses through disciplined marketing, sales process mastery, and operational execution. title: Michael Sciano, Customer Marketing and Advocacy Leader, on Standing Out in a Competitive Job Market
description:
In this episode of The Peerbound Podcast, host Sunny Manivannan sits down with Michael Sciano, a seasoned customer marketing and advocacy leader with more than 15 years of experience across industry-leading companies including Adobe, Salesforce, and ServiceTitan. Michael shares his unique path from high school history teacher to tech, highlighting lessons learned along the way and what it takes to build a resilient career in customer marketing.

title: How ServiceTitan and AI Help Contractors Streamline, Save, and Scale
description:
How do you turn a kitchen table startup into a thriving HVAC business with five trucks? In this episode, Miranda Deschamps, Office Manager at ServicePlus Heating and Cooling (Ontario, Canada), shares how she and her team use ServiceTitan and AI to drive growth. From surviving a two-week email crash to negotiating smarter with suppliers and building AI-powered inventory systems, Miranda shows how resilience, curiosity, and the right tools can turn everyday challenges into business wins.

description: Job costing is essential for sustainable business growth, and no one explains it better than Tim McGuire, Owner of High Winds Success.
